headline: OpenAI to publicly release GPT-5.6, rolls out conversational AI models
detail: New AI model releases from OpenAI signal continued innovation and demand in the artificial intelligence space. This is a strong positive for the broader tech sector, especially companies involved in AI development and the chips that power them.
rec: This news reinforces the long-term bullish case for your tech holdings. Consider adding to QQQ or SMH on dips if they hold their stops.

headline: Apple commits $30 billion to Broadcom for U.S. chipmaking push
detail: This massive commitment from Apple to Broadcom highlights strong demand and investment in the semiconductor industry. It's a direct positive for chip manufacturers and suppliers, which make up a significant portion of your portfolio.
rec: This is very bullish for your chip exposure. Your scanner also has a long setup for SMH (a chip ETF you hold) at entry 580.85-580.08, stop 573.99.
